raw_responses.title: Dental amalgam — Wikipedia
raw_responses.snippet: Source-domain: γ-1 (Ag3Hg) strong matrix; γ-2 (Sn-Hg) weak phase; high-Cu amalgams form η/η' (Cu6Sn5) to eliminate γ-2.

raw_responses.title: Eta Cu-Sn (Cu6Sn5) crystals in high-Cu dispersant amalgam (PubMed)
raw_responses.snippet: Source-domain: dissolved Sn migrates to Ag-Cu particle surface forming Cu6Sn5; gamma-2 is preferentially eliminated.

raw_responses.title: LOT Merging: Minimizing Feature Drift (2025/5)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: layer-wise task vector merging minimizing feature drift between task experts and unified model.

raw_responses.title: Catalyst: Novel Regularizer for Structured Pruning (2025/7)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: pruning-preserving algebraic condition + auxiliary catalyst-variable regularizer in extended parameter space.

raw_responses.title: Model Merging Survey (2025/3)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: survey of merging approaches; covers task vector pruning, magnitude pruning, hybrid strategies.

raw_responses.title: Model Merging in Era of LLMs (2026/3)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: comprehensive merging survey including FUSE taxonomy, mode-connectivity, MoE.
